films.title: I Origins
films.overview: A molecular biologist's study of the human eye has far-reaching implications about humanity's scientific and spiritual beliefs.

films.title: Mickey 17
films.overview: Unlikely hero Mickey Barnes finds himself in the extraordinary circumstance of working for an employer who demands the ultimate commitment to the job… to die, for a living.

films.title: Okja
films.overview: A young girl named Mija risks everything to prevent a powerful, multi-national company from kidnapping her best friend - a massive animal named Okja.

films.title: Mayhem
films.overview: A virus spreads through an office complex causing white collar workers to act out their worst impulses.

films.title: The Star
films.overview: A small but brave donkey and his animal friends become the unsung heroes of the greatest story ever told: the first Christmas.

films.title: Sorry to Bother You
films.overview: In an alternate present-day version of Oakland, black telemarketer Cassius Green discovers a magical key to professional success – which propels him into a macabre universe.

films.title: Burning
films.overview: Deliveryman Jong-su is out on a job when he runs into Hae-mi, a girl who once lived in his neighborhood. She asks if he'd mind looking after her cat while she's away on a trip to Africa. On her return, she introduces to Jong-su an enigmatic young man named Ben, who she met during her trip. One day Ben tells Jong-su about his most unusual hobby.

films.title: The Humans
films.overview: Erik Blake has gathered three generations of his Pennsylvania family to celebrate Thanksgiving at his daughter’s apartment in lower Manhattan. As darkness falls outside and eerie things start to go bump in the night, the group’s deepest fears are laid bare.

films.title: Minari
films.overview: A Korean American family moves to an Arkansas farm in search of its own American dream. Amidst the challenges of this new life in the strange and rugged Ozarks, they discover the undeniable resilience of family and what really makes a home.

films.title: Trollhunters: Rise of the Titans
films.overview: The Guardians of Arcadia reunite to battle the nefarious Arcane Order, who've reawakened the primordial Titans.

films.title: Nope
films.overview: Residents in a lonely gulch of inland California bear witness to an uncanny, chilling discovery.

films.title: The Rip
films.overview: Trust frays when a team of Miami cops discovers millions in cash inside a run-down stash house, calling everyone — and everything — into question.
